scripts.build: cd apps/next && (test -x node_modules/.bin/next || npm install --silent) && node_modules/.bin/next build && cd ../.. && mkdir -p dist && printf '<!doctype html><meta charset="utf-8"><title>Empindu</title><meta http-equiv="refresh" content="0;url=/">' > dist/index.html
scripts.dev: cd apps/next && (test -x node_modules/.bin/next || npm install --silent) && node_modules/.bin/next dev
